detail.description: Nate Eaton doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Mickey Moniak. Anthony Seigler scores.

Nate Eaton grounds into a force out, shortstop Nasim Nuñez to second baseman Jorbit Vivas. Willson Contreras scores. Romy Gonzalez to 3rd. Caleb Durbin out at 2nd. Nate Eaton to 1st.
